features: Rexona Quantum Dry men's deodorant spray
description: Product description Rexona Quantum Dry men's deodorant spray, 150 ml Directions Shake well before use. Hold can 10-15 cm away from underarm. Spray a thin, even layer onto underarm. Allow to dry before dressing. Reapply as needed for continuous protection. Motion Sense technology ensures deodorant moves with you for all-day freshness.
